title: From complexity to clarity: How AI is transforming insurance for customers
description: Artificial Intelligence is revolutionizing insurance in India. Customers now start their search online, with AI simplifying complex policies into easy conversations. This technology makes insurance understandable and accessible, even in smaller cities. AI-powered tools handle queries, speed up processes, and personalize recommendations. This shift is crucial for increasing insurance penetration across the nation.
content:
Over the past few decades, the insurance industry has evolved steadily alongside technology. From paper-based proposals and branch interactions to call centres and digital platforms, each phase reflects changing customer expectations.
What we are wit... [7985 chars]

title: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman Links Molotov Attack On Home To Rising 'AI Anxiety'
description: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman revealed that a 20-year-old man hurled a Molotov cocktail at his San Francisco residence early Saturday morning, April 11, 2026, in what appears to be linked to rising public anxiety over artificial intelligence. The suspect also threatened OpenAI’s office. Altman shared a family photo, expressing that his family was shaken, and called for broader sharing of AI benefits.
content: New Delhi: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman said on Saturday that a suspect hurled a Molotov cocktail at his San Francisco residence in the US, supposedly due to anger against tech leaders amid rising public anxiety about artificial intelligence (AI). Altman po... [1864 chars]

title: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman issues 'ring of power' warning on AGI
description: Sam Altman said the race to develop artificial general intelligence (AGI) is driving intense competition and conflict among AI companies in a bid to seize control, adding that AGI carries significant societal risks and must not be controlled by a small group of companies.
